videos.headline: Avery Johnson powers past defense for 30-yard rush

videos.headline: BYU takes lead on scoop-and-score TD
videos.description: BYU's Tommy Prassas grabs the loose ball and takes it 30 yards for a Cougars touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tommy Prassas scores 30-yard defensive touchdown vs. Kansas State) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: BYU strikes again before halftime with 23-yard TD strike
videos.description: Jake Retzlaff throws a 23-yard touchdown pass to Chase Roberts before halftime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jake Retzlaff throws 23-yard touchdown pass vs. Kansas State) 2024/09/22 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sione I Moa runs 21 yards for BYU touchdown
videos.description: Sione I Moa finds the end zone for BYU as the Cougars run up the score on Kansas State at home.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sione I Moa runs 21 yards for BYU touchdown) 2024/09/22 ESHEET
